3144160.name: Return To The Village
3144160.description:
"Return To The Village" is an exciting village simulator with survival elements and an open world where complete freedom of action reigns. Immerse yourself in the unique gameplay of the game that will not let you get bored.

At the moment the game features an open world consisting of several villages, many different professions representing the transportation of various goods, as well as many small details that make the gameplay more diverse! From the official professions available are transporting goods to the store on two different vehicles, transporting fuel to the gas station and transporting logs on a logging truck. But in addition to the standard jobs there are others, such as selling fish or cars that can be bought at the junkyard and repaired (currently 2 cars are available).

Now the game is in early access, we will be glad to get your feedback and wishes from you

highlighted.name: My first car I ever bought!
